texto: We didn't ever want 'Tarzan' to feel like he was just a man. We didn't want him to stand up straight or wave good-bye. We wanted to make sure he always had that piece of gorilla in him, that he always had an animal attitude about him.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kevin Lima: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “We didn't ever want 'Tarzan' to feel like he was just a man. We didn't want him to stand up strai…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, man, animal pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de animal e stand-up.

frase_original: We didn't ever want 'Tarzan' to feel like he was just a man. We didn't want him to stand up straight or wave good-bye. We wanted to make sure he always had that piece of gorilla in him, that he always had an animal attitude about him.
